subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! The world of illusion and the visible world are both utter nothingness, though they manifest themselves in the garment of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رضا عالم مجازی و عالم ظاهری هر دو نیست محضند و در لباس هستی جلوه نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
